allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "---TRACKED FILES---"; git ls-files; Write-Output "---ZIP CONTENTS---"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip=[System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\(\(Resolve-Path 'files.zip'\)\); $zip.Entries | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize; $zip.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell($files = @\('contact.html','faq.html','blog.html','shipping.html','returns.html','privacy.html','terms.html'\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $content = Get-Content $f -Raw -Encoding UTF8; if \($content -notmatch 'favicon.svg'\) { $new = $content -replace '<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">', '<link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="favicon.svg">' + "`r`n" + '<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">'; Set-Content $f -Value $new -Encoding UTF8 -NoNewline; Write-Output "patched: $f" } else { Write-Output "skip \(already has\): $f" } })
Bash(git commit -m 'Remove hero camera promo card, fix FAQ accordion double-binding *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix SW: stale-while-revalidate for assets + skipWaiting *)

PowerShell($h = @{ "Accept" = "application/vnd.github+json" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/raphaelsilber325-coder/safeview/pages/builds?per_page=3" -Headers $h; $r | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.created_at\) - $\($_.status\) - $\($_.commit.Substring\(0,7\)\)" } } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
